mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_friend_info ( unionid, create_time, sex, mobile, company_remark, acctid, avatar, english_name, remark_phone, realname, real_remarks, user_id, nickname, position, corp_id, remarks, seq, status ) VALUES ( #{unionid}, #{createTime}, #{sex}, #{mobile}, #{companyRemark}, #{acctid}, #{avatar}, #{englishName}, #{remarkPhone}, #{realname}, #{realRemarks}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{position}, #{corpId}, #{remarks}, #{seq}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_friend_info SET unionid = #{unionid}, create_time = #{createTime}, sex = #{sex}, mobile = #{mobile}, company_remark = #{companyRemark}, acctid = #{acctid}, avatar = #{avatar}, english_name = #{englishName}, remark_phone = #{remarkPhone}, realname = #{realname}, real_remarks = #{realRemarks}, user_id = #{userId}, nickname = #{nickname}, position = #{position}, corp_id = #{corpId}, remarks = #{remarks}, seq = #{seq}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wx_friend_info ( unionid, create_time, sex, mobile, company_remark, acctid, avatar, english_name, remark_phone, realname, real_remarks, user_id, nickname, position, corp_id, remarks, seq, status ) VALUES
( #{item.unionid}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.sex}, #{item.mobile}, #{item.companyRemark}, #{item.acctid}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.englishName}, #{item.remarkPhone}, #{item.realname}, #{item.realRemarks}, #{item.userId}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.position}, #{item.corpId}, #{item.remarks}, #{item.seq}, #{item.status} )
